title: A Quiet Day in Kadıköy
description: A themed day in Istanbul: Moda Beach Park and Promenade, Mephisto Bookstore - Bahariye, Cool Cafe Moda, Moda Park.
notes: Start with a slow walk along the sea, taking in the views.
Get lost among the shelves, and mix up a few books.
Savor a cup of filtered coffee in a quiet corner.
Sit back on the bank, and take a breather.
Free public toilets are available along the way.
